data.title: Trump: Federal Reserve Chairman Powell is either incompetent or dishonest
data.description: US President Trump stated that Federal Reserve Chairman Powell is either incompetent or dishonest. Powell has not done a good job. (Jinshi)

data.title: Trump Criticizes Federal Reserve Chair Powell's Competence and Integrity
data.description: According to PANews, U.S. President Donald Trump has expressed strong criticism of Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell, stating that Powell is either incompetent or lacks integrity. Trump remarked that Powell's performance in his role has been unsatisfactory. Meanwhile, U.S. House Speaker Johnson commented that if Powell is innocent, the investigation will reveal the truth. Johnson emphasized the necessity for the Department of Justice to continue its investigation into Powell.

data.title: JustLend DAO Reports Significant Growth in Total Value Locked
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, the latest weekly report from JustLend DAO, a leading decentralized lending protocol on the TRON network, reveals that the platform's total value locked has surpassed $6.92 billion. The deposit volume has reached $4.15 billion, while the total borrowing amount stands at $215 million. As a core DeFi infrastructure within the TRON ecosystem, JustLend DAO is demonstrating robust growth in the DeFi market, providing efficient on-chain lending services to users worldwide.

data.title: Coinbase opens Jupiter (JUPITER) trading to users in New York State
data.description: Coinbase announced that Jupiter (JUPITER) is now available for trading to New York State residents. Users can buy, sell, convert, store, and transfer funds through the website and mobile app. Coinbase holds a virtual currency business license issued by the New York State Department of Financial Services.

data.title: Ethereum's Role in On-Chain Real-World Asset Settlement Highlighted
data.description: According to PANews, Ethereum has been identified as a key platform for on-chain real-world asset settlement, as reported by Ethereum's official source citing data from @RWA_xyz. Ondo Finance, which issues on-chain physical assets such as stocks, ETFs, and government bonds, has approximately 77% of its total value locked (TVL) deployed on Ethereum. This accounts for about 11.6% of the total TVL in Ethereum's real-world asset sector, underscoring Ethereum's central role in this domain.

data.title: US House Speaker Johnson: If Federal Reserve Chairman Powell is innocent, the truth will come to light during the investigation.
data.description: U.S. House Speaker Boris Johnson stated that if Federal Reserve Chairman Jerome Powell is innocent, the truth will come to light during the investigation. The Justice Department's investigation into Powell must continue. (Jinshi)

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Surpasses 93,000 USDT with a 1.75% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Jan 13, 2026, 15:37 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has crossed the 93,000 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 93,134 USDT, with a narrowed 1.75% increase in 24 hours.

data.description:

data.description:
Ripple developer reveals biggest XRP Ledger problem amid growing push for adoption.

data.title: A whale bought 9,157 AAVE tokens, and has now purchased and pledged 78,074 AAVE tokens.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a whale (0xddc...7931) spent 501 ETH (approximately $1.57 million) to buy 9,157 AAVE at a price of $171.4. This whale has cumulatively bought and staked 78,074 AAVE (approximately $16.75 million) at a price of $214.5, earning 463.48 AAVE (approximately $79,000) through staking, and currently faces a loss of $3.33 million.

data.title: Bloomberg: Crypto-friendly bank Old Glory Bank to list via SPAC
data.description: Crypto-friendly lender Old Glory Bank will become a publicly traded company through a deal with blank-check company Digital Asset Acquisition Corp. Old Glory Bank has deep roots in traditional lending in Oklahoma, but rebranded as a digital bank in 2022 and announced plans to fully integrate cryptocurrency into its lending, deposit, and investment products. (Bloomberg)

data.title: Federal Reserve's Mossala: Further rate cuts may be needed if risks to the labor market worsen.
data.description: Federal Reserve official Mohamed Musala stated that if risks to the labor market worsen or inflation declines further, more interest rate cuts might be necessary; adopting an easing policy at this time would be unwise. (Jinshi)

data.title: Federal Reserve Considers Further Rate Cuts Amid Economic Concerns
data.description: According to Odaily, Federal Reserve official Musalem stated that if risks in the job market intensify or inflation rates continue to decline, additional interest rate cuts may be necessary.

data.title: Federal Reserve Official Sees Limited Justification for Further Policy Easing
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, Federal Reserve official Musalem has stated that there is little justification for further easing of policies in the short term.

data.title: Federal Reserve's Musalem Highlights Need for Risk Visibility Before Policy Easing
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, Federal Reserve representative Musalem emphasized the necessity of observing tangible risks before considering further policy relaxation. This statement underscores the cautious approach the Federal Reserve is taking in its monetary policy decisions.

data.title: Next XRP Wave Shows Where Price Is Headed Next, But There’s A Catch
data.description:
XRP has reached a technically decisive level, and the next wave of price action is expected to clarify whether the market is setting up for recovery or preparing for another structural breakdown. Recent movement confirms that a key support has done its job, but the upside path comes with strict conditions that will determine whether this bounce is sustainable or merely a pause before deeper downside. XRP Bounce Is Real, But It’s Still A Test Move Yesterday, renowned crypto analyst CasiTrades took to X, pointing out that XRP’s weekend decline stopped exactly at the macro 0. 5 retracement near $2
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/analysis/xrp/next-xrp-wave-shows-price/

data.title: YZi Labs Invests in Genius
data.description: Yzi Labs posted an article on X, announcing their investment in Genius, a professional trading terminal designed for on-chain execution. With CZ joining as an advisor, Yzi Labs stated that Genius embodies the core of its investment thesis: backing infrastructure that fuses the speed, liquidity, and privacy of centralized exchanges without compromising on user ownership or decentralization, to accelerate the buildout of a private, high-velocity on-chain trading terminal.

data.title: Today, US Bitcoin ETFs saw a net inflow of 492 BTC, while Ethereum ETFs experienced a net outflow of 27,478 ETH.
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, today the US Bitcoin ETF saw a net inflow of 492 BTC, compared to a net outflow of 14,643 BTC over the past 7 days; the Ethereum ETF saw a net outflow of 27,478 ETH, compared to a net outflow of 95,245 ETH over the past 7 days; and Solana saw a net inflow of 74,863 SOL, compared to a net inflow of 278,910 SOL over the past 7 days.

data.title: Thailand's Central Bank Tightens Scrutiny on Stablecoin Activities
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, the Bank of Thailand has intensified its monitoring of stablecoin activities as part of a broader initiative to combat 'gray money.' The central bank's governor, Vitai Ratanakorn, revealed that approximately 40% of USDT sellers operating on Thai platforms are foreigners, who are not permitted to conduct transactions in the country. Consequently, stablecoin activities are now subject to stricter scrutiny alongside cash flows, gold trading, and electronic wallet transactions.
